# Upadeśasāhasrī

*[Śaṅkara](../philosophers/shankara.md) · *Upadeśasāhasrī**

"The thousand teachings", one of the few independent treatises (rather than a commentary) confidently ascribed to Śaṅkara. It sets out, in didactic form, the path of knowledge that leads to recognizing the identity of the self and brahman.
